headlines.title: Republicans cancel votes amid GOP fight over Trump’s ‘anti-weaponization’ fund
headlines.description: Objections to President Donald Trump’s controversial “anti-weaponization” fund prompted Senate Republicans to postpone votes to fund ICE and Border Patrol until June.

headlines.title: DNC releases long-delayed 2024 autopsy, despite party frustrations with its findings
headlines.description: Democratic National Committee Chair Ken Martin on Thursday released the party’s autopsy report on the 2024 election after facing intense pressure to do so

headlines.title: Iran-U.S. diplomacy intensifies as Trump seeks ‘right answers,’ Tehran signals gaps ‘reduced’
headlines.description: A new burst of diplomatic action intensified Thursday in a push to break the deadlock between the United States and Iran.

headlines.title: Judge dismisses criminal case against Newport News assistant principal Ebony Parker
headlines.description: A Virginia judge dismissed the criminal case against a former Newport News assistant principal who was accused of ignoring warnings before a 6-year-old student shot and wounded his teacher. NBC News' Danny Cevallos reports on why the charges against Ebony Parker were dismissed.

headlines.title: Detroit-Bound Plane Diverted to Canada Over Ebola Concerns
headlines.description: An Air France flight headed to Detroit suddenly diverted to Canada over concerns that a Congolese passenger may have been exposed to Ebola. Meanwhile, the American doctor who tested positive for the virus is now in stable condition, according to the CDC. NBC’s Molly Hunter reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: How Severe Weather is Impacting Memorial Day Weekend Travel
headlines.description: Wild weather across the country is impacting millions just as Memorial Day weekend travel is set to ramp up. Torrential rain, severe flooding and massive hail pounded the Northeast causing over 7,000 flight delays. NBC’s Emilie Ikeda reports and TODAY’s Dylan Dreyer tracks the latest forecast.

headlines.title: Comedian and businessman Byron Allen on future of late night
headlines.description: As Stephen Colbert says goodbye at CBS, Byron Allen steps into the coveted slot with "Comics Unleashed." NBC News' Chloe Melas sat down with him to talk about his deal, media empire, and plans for a new era of network comedy.

headlines.title: Patrick Stewart, AI and I encountered the Bard. Resistance was futile.
headlines.description: My journey through Shakespeare was guided by “Star Trek” star Patrick Stewart, who just recorded a new audiobook of the sonnets, and Claude AI.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Spotify to reserve tour tickets for artist ‘superfans’ in support of live music
headlines.description: For years, many concertgoers have voiced their frustration over how hard it is to get tickets to their favorite artists’ tours amid scalpers and soaring resale prices

headlines.title: Suit targets whites-only Arkansas community over applicant rejected for Jewish roots, Black husband
headlines.description: A white supremacist group is facing a federal discrimination lawsuit filed by a real estate broker who says she was barred from purchasing property in their rural Arkansas community because of her Jewish ancestry, Black husband, and biracial children

headlines.title: Republicans cancel votes amid GOP fight over Trump’s ‘anti-weaponization’ fund
headlines.description: Objections to President Donald Trump’s controversial “anti-weaponization” fund prompted Senate Republicans to postpone votes to fund ICE and Border Patrol until June.
